steps.prompt: Capital letters go at the start of names and sentences! Find A — the big version of a!
steps.feedback: A! Capital A starts Apple and Ant. Now find B!
B! Capital B starts Bird and Banana. Now find C!
C! Capital C starts Cat and Cow. Now find D!
D! Capital D starts Dog and Duck. Last one — find E!
E! Capital E starts Egg and Elephant. Capital letters — bigger, bolder, for important words!
